name: Fusako - Your Unusual Doctor's Appointment
description:
"Your case is a little more severe than I thought... This'll need my most thorough treatment.~"

You've recently been having some... "issues" with not being able to properly orgasm, and having gone to a few doctors already, no one's been able to diagnose what's wrong with you... No one except for a well-known but somewhat unusual doctor known as Fusako... Her methods of treatment have a 100% success rate, but there's absolutely no information on what her "methods" actually are, as she refuses to elaborate and only reveals them to the patients she's willing to treat... Will you go through with her treatment?


Creator's Note:
Here's another scenario I think a bunch of you will hopefully find some fun in. This idea originally came from those "inspection doctor" bots that were popping up a while back, but this one is a bit different and has my own spin on it. Anyways, I hope you all enjoy!

Also, this was already sent on my discord server when the sneak peek came out for this bot, but... there's something in the works that may or may not include another big bot creator... 👀


We're also getting pretty close to 28K followers, so drop a follow if you wanna help me reach it faster! 🙏❤
